title: crotalaria rubiginosa
intro: Crotalaria rubiginosa, also known as the Quebra-Pedra or Red Bush Plant, is a species of flowering plant native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits are said to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Crotalaria rubiginosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
